<!-- GENERATED FROM skills/create-project/SKILL.md — DO NOT EDIT. Run `npm run gen:docs` after editing the skill. -->

Scaffold a new Dart or Flutter project from a Very Good CLI template. Supports flutter_app, dart_package, flutter_package, flutter_plugin, dart_cli, flame_game, and docs_site templates.

## When to use it

Use when user says "create a new project", "start a new flutter app", "scaffold a package", "initialize a dart cli", "new flame game", or "generate a plugin".

## How to run it

Invoke the `/create-project` skill in Claude Code (arguments: `[template] [project-name]`).

[View the full skill definition on GitHub](https://github.com/VeryGoodOpenSource/vgv-ai-flutter-plugin/blob/main/skills/create-project/SKILL.md)
